productDisplayName: Tonga Women White & Blue Printed Top
description: Style Note Tonga delivers a great range of choices for the young fashionable woman. Colour-pops and unique designs add a playful edge to day-wear. Sweet hues and romantic trends bring out the best in you. So grab your favourite piece today before they run out! Product Details Crafted in fine fabric this trendy top has short mandarin collar with a split V-neck, sleeveless with a ruffle at the armhole, buttoned chest placket with ruffles on either side of the placket with a smocked and elasticated hem Material and Care 100% polyester Hand wash cold Do not bleach Hang or line dry Size and Fit Regular fit The model (height 5'8" and chest 33") is wearing a size M
